title: Strait of Hormuz ship evacuation halted after vessel attack

snapshot.title: Strait of Hormuz ship evacuation halted after vessel attack
snapshot.description: DUBAI: A United Nations agency paused the evacuation of ships through the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday after the British military said a vessel was hit by a projectile off the coast of Oman following the passage of several tankers that used a route backed by the UN The head of the International Maritime Organization said the plan to move stranded ships out of the Arabian Gulf
snapshot.author: AP
snapshot.pageTitle: Strait of Hormuz ship evacuation halted after vessel attack | Arab News
